headline: GE Vernova Surges 12.8% in a Month: Time to Hold or Fold the Stock?
summary: GEV jumps 12.8% in a month as data center power demand fuels growth, but premium valuation raises questions on timing for new investors.

headline: GE Vernova Extends Nuclear Ambitions In Europe With New SMR Services Deal
summary: GE Vernova's Hitachi Nuclear Energy division signed a Main Services Agreement with Sweden based AFRY to support deployment of the BWRX-300 small modular reactor in Europe. The agreement focuses on advancing engineering, licensing, and project support for GE Vernova's small modular reactor technology across European markets. This step expands GE Vernova's nuclear footprint beyond previously discussed U.S. activity and highlights concrete project progress in the region. For investors tracking...
